crime.value: Ty's death outside a coffee shop
crime.quote: all I could see was his pale body… his pale, lifeless body. No breathe. No heart beat.

victim.value: Ty, a young man with close relationships to Katherine and Phillip
victim.quote: his beautiful blonde hair, now crimson red, his deep green eyes, now pale and gray

culprit_and_motive.value: Possibly Shelby, who appeared happy upon seeing Ty's death and is being avoided
culprit_and_motive.quote: she looked happy, even when she saw Ty, dead, on the ground

investigator.value: Katherine, the deceased's girlfriend who witnesses the aftermath and seeks answers
investigator.quote: I stared at Ty for a long time trying to remember good times I had had with him

red_herring.value: Shelby's suspicious behavior and timing creates misdirection from the true circumstances of Ty's death
red_herring.quote: Hey, Kat. Did Ty die or somethin'? ...she looked happy, even when she saw Ty, dead, on the ground

clue_fairness.value: Precise timestamps and locations are consistently provided to reader for each scene
clue_fairness.quote: Sunday, 11:28 pm. outside the coffee shop...Sunday, 11:30 pm. outside the coffee shop

social_world.value: High school social hierarchy with popular/smart students and friendship dynamics
social_world.quote: my best friend, the smartest, most popular girl in school

investigator_wound.value: Katherine's grief and loss of her boyfriend Ty makes her vulnerable and dependent on others for support
investigator_wound.quote: I leaned into his hug and smiled knowing somebody was finally here to help me through this

_meta.title: ebook kirsten lott his golden tears
